## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Transmit Security and GrowthX for marketing and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on content creation, AI-powered outbound, and strategic link building as initial work streams](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating an operating system for pipeline generation and efficient content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Potential to leverage GrowthX's AI tools for sales enablement, including call analysis and follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Discussion about website rebuild project and considerations for choosing the right agency partner](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Challenges and Priorities

  - [Previous marketing efforts resulted in $22 million spent over 2.5 years with poor results](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Need for an operating system on pipeline generation to avoid constant technical shifts](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Focus on tripling down on successful technical topics within key pillars](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Short-term, mid-term, and long-term strategies being developed](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

  - [Desire to create white papers, blogs, and content for tech talk series](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Interest in repurposing existing case studies and other content assets](https://fathom.video/share/LSU8Yummz4SJsRyaGLxkTk5ZEqYoyaan?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
